name: MIKULICZ DISEASE
definition: painless bilateral symmetric swelling of lacrimal and salivary glands (parotid (80%), submandibular,
discriminating_features: homogeneous attenuation + enhancement of involved glands
low signal intensity (= isointense to muscle) on T1WI
homogeneous low to intermediate SI on T2WI ← increased cellularity + fibrosis

general: homogeneous attenuation + enhancement of involved glands
MR: low signal intensity (= isointense to muscle) on T1WI
homogeneous low to intermediate SI on T2WI ← increased cellularity + fibrosis
